CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'SO', HYPERLINK("/" & Sales_Order__r.Id, Sales_Order__r.Name), if( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Order', HYPERLINK("/" & Order_S__r.Id, Order_S__r.OrderNumber ),if( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Work_Order', HYPERLINK("/" & Work_Order__r.Id, Work_Order__r.Name), IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Purchase_Order', HYPERLINK("/" & Purchase_Order__r.Id, Purchase_Order__r.Name), IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Transfer_Order', HYPERLINK("/" & Transfer_Order__r.Id, Transfer_Order__r.Name), IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'RMA', HYPERLINK("/" & RMA__r.Id, RMA__r.Name),HYPERLINK("/" & Id, Name) ))))))
CustomField.label: Order
